title: Pure Core, UI Adapters, Dependency Direction, and Snapshots · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for pure core, ui adapters, dependency direction, and snapshots and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, Tcl, Tk, display, input, assistive-technology, file, package, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for pure maze core with Tk adapter ports. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Keep topology, generation, search, state transitions, and evidence free of Tk widget and operating-system dependencies.
Define narrow render, scheduling, input, status, dialog, persistence, and clock ports owned by the application layer.
Publish immutable or copied snapshots so rendering and tests cannot mutate authoritative state accidentally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Architecture Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A quiz puzzle team handles case 7283 during a classroom algorithm comparison. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction; the prior good state must survive failure; then switch the solver or generator and restate each guarantee. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. options.text: For diagnose the hidden failure, solve one convenient seeded maze, omit revision, coordinate and wall invariants, topology oracle, frontier trace, changed algorithm or heuristic, callback ownership, keyboard and structured-text access, native Tk evidence, failure, recovery, and package transfer, then accept a screenshot as maze proof. This does not satisfy Architecture Evidence for pure maze core with Tk adapter ports.
Run the Architecture Evidence boundary case for pure maze core with Tk adapter ports, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

Accept the Architecture Evidence result because visible pure maze core with Tk adapter ports output is the highest authority. That claim fails the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary for Architecture Evidence.

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Architecture Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Architecture Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz puzzle team handles case 5664 during a low-vision player session. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction; the player cannot rely on color or animation; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Demonstrate pure-core tests, fake adapters, dependency inspection, native adapter smoke, and changed implementation evidence.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Architecture Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Architecture Evidence through the concrete pure maze core with Tk adapter ports case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Architecture Evidence, keep Architecture Evidence connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Demonstrate pure-core tests, fake adapters, dependency inspection, native adapter smoke, and changed implementation evidence.
